task.study_requested: Brain MRI with and without contrast

handoff_policy.clinical_rationale: Imaging agent orders study and requests DICOM integration
Registry resolves DICOM query profile for PACS integration
DICOM agent queries PACS for study metadata
FHIR agent maps DICOM metadata to ImagingStudy resource
Specialty care receives ImagingStudy for telehealth consult
DICOM access and telehealth consult audited for HIPAA compliance
